hero.description: Société Africa Services & Equipements pour les Compagnies Minières, Oil & Gas. Dedicated to securing the supply chain and engineering infrastructure for West Africa's most demanding industrial environments.

section.title: Engineering and procurement for heavy industry.

activities.title: Central Purchasing & Trading
activities.copy: Acting as a dedicated 'Centrale d'achat', we manage complex import-export logistics and global trading to secure the industrial supply chain.

activities.title: Construction & BTP
activities.copy: Comprehensive civil engineering, general construction, and building renovation services specifically tailored for demanding operational sites.

activities.title: Industrial Maintenance
activities.copy: Heavy mechanical and industrial maintenance protocols designed to minimize downtime and protect vital operational lifecycles.

activities.title: General Contracting
activities.copy: End-to-end site preparation and utility management, encompassing advanced electrical and plumbing engineering services.

hero.description: From strategic planning to heavy equipment mobilisation, AFSECMO delivers precision across the full industrial project lifecycle.

sectorsGrid.description: We are a leading industrial partner driving infrastructure, energy, and logistics across West Africa and beyond.

hero.subtitle: // A clear process from request to site execution
hero.description: For each project, AFSECMO follows a disciplined workflow to reduce delays, clarify responsibilities and keep stakeholders informed.

phases.title: Requirement review
phases.desc: We define the client need, operating context, timeframe, specifications and required documentation through rigorous collaborative assessment.

phases.title: Sourcing & technical validation
phases.desc: We compare suppliers, equipment options, delivery constraints, quality requirements and commercial conditions to minimize risk.

phases.title: Mobilisation planning
phases.desc: We coordinate personnel, equipment, transport, site access, safety preparation and logistics readiness for seamless deployments.

phases.title: Execution & reporting
phases.desc: We support field delivery with proactive follow-up, issue resolution, documentation and continuous status communication.

phases.title: After-service support
phases.desc: We assist with long-term maintenance needs, reorders, supplier warranties and recurring operational requirements post-completion.

hero.description: Rigorous operational coordination and compliance enforced across every site.

standards.title: Site & Field Safety
standards.copy: Work planning aligned with safe site access, protective equipment and field procedures. We do not compromise on crew security.

standards.title: Vetted Sourcing
standards.copy: Selection of suppliers and contractors based on capability, availability, and traceability. Every vendor must meet our stringent compliance baseline.

standards.title: Clear Reporting
standards.copy: Clear quotes, delivery notes, service records, technical references, and follow-up reports. Full auditability across the project lifecycle.

standards.title: Project Milestones
standards.copy: Regular communication on timelines, constraints, delivery status, and project milestones. You always know your operational standing.
